- [What Is A Thermoforming Machine?](https://tz-machinery.com/what-is-a-thermoforming-machine/): A thermoforming machines, also known as vacuum forming machines, are devices that mold sheets of thermoplastic materials into various shapes.

Thermoforming and injection molding are two popular plastic manufacturing processes, each with unique advantages. Thermoforming involves heating a plastic sheet until pliable, then shaping it using a thermoforming mold and trimming it to create the final product.
